svg.title: Video to Audio Converter - Full App Flow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the complete request lifecycle from user uploading a video to downloading the converted audio file

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I build the video file input in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I send a video file using FormData and Axios with upload progress?')
sendPrompt('How do I show upload and conversion progress in React?')
sendPrompt('How does Multer handle video uploads in Express?')
sendPrompt('How do I use fluent-ffmpeg to convert video to MP3 in Node.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I stream the converted audio file back to the client in Express?')
sendPrompt('How do I delete temp files after the download in Node.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I trigger a file download from a Blob response in React?')
